name: Baked Pasta with Broccoli, Olives and Pancetta

ingredients.item: One 4 oz. slice of pancetta, finely diced
Salt and black pepper, to taste

method: Preheat the oven to 425 F and oil an ovenproof baking dish. Add in the tomatoes, broccoli, garlic and basil. Sprinkle
with half the olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Roast for about 20 minutes, until softened.
Prepare the pasta according to package directions and toss with the roasted tomatoes, broccoli and garlic.
In a large, deep skillet, heat the remaining 1 tbsp. of olive oil. Add in the pancetta and cook over moderately high
heat, occasionally stir, until they brown and nearly crisp, about 5 minutes. Stir and add the onion. Cook on low heat,
stirring occasionally, till softened, about 5 minutes.
Toss everything in the baking dish. Add in the ricotta and Parmesan cheese and stir to combine.
Bake in a preheated to 350 F oven for 10 minutes or until the cheese turns golden.
Cheese Manicotti is a classic cheesy Italian dish with pasta shells stuffed with mozzarella and ricotta cheeses. The
traditional version of this dish has a tomato sauce, meat and vegetables, and this recipe omits them for the sake of
simplicity. This makes it the perfect weeknight meal recipe to make in your slow cooker or Instant Pot.
